title: MultiPixel - 乘方像素
description: A 32×32 resolution original HD style texture pack based on the new Minecraft textures.
body:
# Chinese

## 声明

- <u>**本资源包已取得原作者授权转载。**</u>
- <u>**按照作者规定，本页面仅转载作者免费公开的资源包（所有正式版和部分测试版），更多内容请到作者指定的爱发电页面付费下载（参见``其他信息``）。**</u>

## 简介

MultiPixel（乘方像素）是一款基于新版 Minecraft 纹理的 32×32 分辨率原版高清风格纹理包，如果您喜欢新版纹理，并想提升其分辨率，那么这款纹理包可能对您胃口。

乘方像素的高清风格：边缘线和一些杂色纹理会被细化，但对于整个颜色区域的相似色块纹理则会采取柔和的高清处理方式，而不会添加过多细节。

本纹理包覆盖全纹理贴图。

## 其他功能

对于 Java 版，本纹理包除了原版贴图外，目前提供 OptiFine 的无缝玻璃和部分 UI 的高清纹理。

对于基岩版，本纹理包除了全高清贴图以外，还增加了另外两种样式可供切换，以让玩家获得更佳的使用体验，具体请查看[**乘方像素基岩版样式介绍**](https://www.bilibili.com/opus/610797546956779332)。

## 版权声明

- 用户可以修改本包内容供个人使用，但是禁止在网络上发布修改过的纹理包。
- 用户不可以私自将它整合到其他纹理发布，更不可以用来盈利。
- 未经作者同意禁止私自修改后进行第二次发布或用于商业用途。

# English

## Representations

- <u>**This resource pack has been reproduced with the authorization of the original author.**</u>
- <u>**In accordance with the author's regulations, this page only reproduces the author's free public resource packs (all official versions and some beta versions), and for more content, please go to the author's designated Love Power page to pay for downloads (see "``Other Information``").**</u>

## Description

MultiPixel is a 32×32 resolution original HD style texture pack based on the new Minecraft textures, so if you like the new textures and want to increase their resolution, then this texture pack may be to your liking.

Multiply square pixels in HD style: edge lines and some stray textures are refined, but a soft HD treatment is given to similarly colored textures across the entire color area without adding too much detail.

This texture pack covers full texture mapping.

## Other functions

For Java Edition, this texture pack provides OptiFine's seamless glass and some UI HD textures in addition to the original textures.

For Keystone Edition, in addition to the full HD textures, two other styles have been added to allow players to switch between them for a better experience, please check out [**Multiplier Pixel Keystone Edition style introduction**](https://www.bilibili.com/opus/610797546956779332).

## Copyright statement

- Users may modify the contents of this pack for personal use, but it is forbidden to distribute modified texture packs on the web.
- Users may not privately integrate it into other textures for distribution, much less for profit.
- Private modification for second release or commercial use is prohibited without the author's consent.
